title: New EVA Schick promo campaign
wikitext:
[]: New EVA/Schick promo campaign             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Apr 24, 2015 12:46 pm https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k1dhWFQxb8E Maintenance, or building up hype?

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Apr 24, 2015 12:56 pm Maintenance, or building up hype?

[]:             Quote Post by thunderhand » Fri Apr 24, 2015 1:20 pm "Yes, used to open the door to a clean shave... Schickuchadnezzar's Key." Honestly though, I wouldn't be surprised if You Can (Always) Be Free is FINAL's subtitle though (either that or it's a Schick thing and I'm completely stupid). Guess we'll find out whatever this is when that countdown ends

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Fri Apr 24, 2015 1:54 pm An ad for razors. I've been eagerly waiting for news about Final for over two and a half years now wracked by depression and angst over Anno did to Shinji. And you give me an ad for RAZORS!?!? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Apr 24, 2015 3:08 pm Advance notice to get on the Shick train again, was late to the last one and got just 1 razor at the time. How soon were the previous movies announced before they were screened? Given the lack of concrete word about a 3.0+1.0 release I doubt it'll come out later this year.

[]:             Quote Post by The Cruel » Fri Apr 24, 2015 3:17 pm Really guys!!! This is the best Eva Commercial I've seen since the Eva Mentos Commercial!!!! SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Apr 24, 2015 4:23 pm ^You do know that's a fanmade commercial don't you?

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Fri Apr 24, 2015 4:47 pm Well a razor is a sign of growing up! Then again so is a full beard...

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Fri Apr 24, 2015 9:07 pm I'm gone for four days and this is what brings me back with anticipation on Final news? God fucking dammit, Anno. You and your product placement deals. They're fucking hilarious, but stop teasing my balls if you're not gonna make me cum...if you know what I mean.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Apr 25, 2015 3:14 am Seeing my boy love shaving that much brings me such joy.

[]:             Quote Post by Shamsiel-kun » Sat Apr 25, 2015 5:05 am Do beards, just like tomatoes, also have an AT-field?

[]:             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Sat Apr 25, 2015 5:15 am This is hilarious and I don't even understand the Japanese. Speaking of which, someone should translate it.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sat May 02, 2015 2:30 pm 2 Eva-01 razors up on the Evastore for 2,419円 each , get yours now!

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sat May 02, 2015 4:19 pm I am not pay 20 bucks for two razors, thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon May 04, 2015 9:43 pm That was per razor.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue May 05, 2015 10:04 am Per razor??? For that I should have a smooth face for at least two weeks per shave. (Either that, or all my enemies turn to LCL with each face rinse.)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue May 05, 2015 11:53 am Cash cow needs something to sustain itself from anime fans

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Tue May 05, 2015 3:11 pm If you put Eva on it, they will buy it, we all know this. And yes I would drop that much on Eva razor. And not use it.

[]:             Quote Post by Shoujo Kakumei Asuka » Tue May 05, 2015 4:41 pm A brand such as Evangelion can convince people to drop unlimited money on it. Many of the other largest brands in Japan (Pokemon, Dragon Ball, Madoka) can convince people to spend huge amounts of money as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Wed May 13, 2015 5:48 am Two more videos have been released- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VxKdxY2Y0c4 (3/3) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=x2SRcG1IOfs (2/3) All I have to say is Shave Impact, and for 2/3 is Tsubasa wo Kudasai piano....
